My Booth Showcase

Showcase your booth to customers browsing our website. Add photos or a short video of your booth, write a description of what you offer, and publish it for the world to see.

When published, your booth will appear on the public Booths page

Booth Photos

Add at least one photo of your booth. Show off your displays, products, and personality! (Max 8 photos, 5MB each)

Click to add photos or drag and drop

JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP — up to 5MB each

Booth Video (Optional)

Add a short video tour of your booth. Keep it under 30 seconds for the best experience. (Max 50MB)

Click to upload a video

MP4, MOV, or WebM — up to 50MB

Vendor Landing Page

$10/mo Add-On

Your own page on the Bowenstreet Market website. Share your link to grow your brand, get found on search engines, and connect with customers directly.

Your landing page is not yet activated. Contact the market office to get started for $10/month.

Your Page URL

Choose a custom URL for your landing page. This is the link you can share on social media, business cards, etc.

About Your Business

Tell your story in more detail. This is your chance to connect with customers and share what makes you unique.

Contact Information

Add your contact details so customers can reach you directly. All fields are optional — only share what you are comfortable with.

Social Media

Link your social accounts so customers can follow you. Your socials will be displayed alongside the market's socials on your landing page.

Help search engines find your page. These will appear in Google search results.
